title: Role of suPAR in lung and kidney crosstalk during injury
author: Kumar, Varsha S

description: scRNA seq analysis. Samples are single cell RNA seq data files from transgenic and wildtype mouse lungs and kidneys, need to compare the various groups to identify pathways and genes regulated in this process
